name: Monolith
description: Standing stones in a flat desert light, each dragging its long shadow — every redraw re-raises the stones at new heights.

code.style: --slabc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* slab and shadow share emitted position and height so they stay joined at the base */ --mx: @r(28, 48); --mh: @r(46, 84); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: calc(@var(--mx) * 1%); width: @rand(20%, 30%); height: calc(@var(--mh) * 1%); border-radius: 99px 99px 0 0; background: var(--slabc); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: calc(@var(--mx) * 1% - @var(--mh) * 0.62%); width: calc(@var(--mh) * 0.62%); height: 9%; background: rgba(50, 40, 30, 0.3); transform: skewX(38deg); transform-origin: 100% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
